field.label: Enabled
field.help: This will enable or disable this key.

field.label: Name
field.help: Set the name for this TSIG key. This name must match the key name configured on the DHCP server.

field.label: Algorithm
field.help: Set the authentication algorithm for this key.

field.label: Secret
field.help: The base64-encoded key secret. Generate a random key with ddns-confgen or a similar tool.
